case_title: MAEHL MARC F VS SHAPIRO ALAN et al

docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $630.00 FILED BY SKYLINE PROPERTIES AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MAEHL MARC F ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SKYLINE PROPERTIES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT MAEHL MARC F STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SHAPIRO ALAN SKYLINE PROPERTIES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $425.00 FILED BY MAEHL MARC F AS TO DEFENDANT SHAPIRO ALAN SKYLINE PROPERTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-06-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAEHL MARC F RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SKYLINE PROPERTIES $125.00 PRINCIPAL, $41.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $166.00, DISMISS ON ALAN SHAPIRO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
